summary: Matched and named additional pieces of sysdolphin baselib controller handling. The PR moved several controller symbols from anonymous HSD_Controller_address names to descriptive HSD_Pad names, added partial C implementations/stubs in controller.c, exposed needed declarations in controller.h and dolphin pad.h, and updated assembly callsites and GALE01 symbols to use the new names.
what_changed: Added partial controller.c implementations for helper/status functions including HSD_PadRawQueueShift, HSD_PadRawMerge, HSD_PadClampCheck1, HSD_PadCrossDir, HSD_PadRenewStatus, and HSD_PadReset.
Converted HSD_PadLibData, HSD_PadMasterStatus, and HSD_PadCopyStatus in controller.c from extern declarations into actual definitions.
Added NOT_IMPLEMENTED stubs for HSD_PadRenewMasterStatus, HSD_PadRenewCopyStatus, and HSD_PadZeroQueue while still giving them stable descriptive names and call signatures.

Renamed controller assembly functions and symbol table entries: HSD_Controller_80376D04 to HSD_PadFlushQueue, HSD_Controller_80377B54 to HSD_PadZeroQueue, HSD_Controller_80377CE8 to HSD_PadRenewStatus, and HSD_Controller_80377D18 to HSD_PadReset.
Updated assembly callsites in gm_1A36.s, lb_0198.s, toy.s, tyfigupon.s, and tylist.s to call the new HSD_Pad* names.
Extended src/dolphin/pad/pad.h with PAD_CHAN0-3 constants, PAD_CHAN0_BIT through PAD_CHAN3_BIT masks, PAD_ERR_NO_CONTROLLER, and a PADRecalibrate prototype.
Extended controller.h with HSD_PadFlushQueue, HSD_PadRenewRawStatus, HSD_PadRenewMasterStatus, HSD_PadZeroQueue, HSD_PadRenewStatus, and HSD_PadReset declarations.
smart_moves: Renamed symbols at the same addresses in both config/GALE01/symbols.txt and assembly callsites, keeping the project-wide symbol graph consistent.
Used behavior-derived names that describe controller semantics rather than preserving address-based placeholder names.
Implemented HSD_PadRenewStatus as a small orchestration wrapper that matches the assembly sequence: renew raw status, renew master status, renew copy status, then zero the queue.
Implemented HSD_PadReset with the expected interrupt-protected critical section around rumble removal, per-channel rumble off, queue flush, PADRecalibrate, reset_switch clear, and interrupt restore.
Added missing Dolphin PAD constants and PADRecalibrate declaration instead of relying on undeclared externs or magic-only local declarations.
Left larger unmatched functions as NOT_IMPLEMENTED stubs while still carving out matched wrappers and names, allowing incremental progress without overclaiming complete controller decompilation.
decomp_lessons: For controller work, small wrapper functions can often be matched first by recognizing ordered calls into raw/master/copy status renewal and queue cleanup.
When replacing HSD_Controller_address placeholders, update symbols.txt and every assembly callsite in the same change to avoid stale references.
Reset routines touching PAD state should be checked for OSDisableInterrupts/OSRestoreInterrupts bracketing and rumble shutdown side effects.
Header work is part of matching: adding SDK-like constants and prototypes can remove local extern clutter and make matched C more natural.
Address-based function names in asm may represent already-identifiable HSD_Pad operations; cross-reference call context before choosing final names.
Use NOT_IMPLEMENTED selectively for known but not-yet-matched functions so surrounding matched functions can land without pretending full coverage.
naming_conventions: Controller-related baselib functions follow the HSD_Pad* prefix rather than HSD_Controller_* once behavior is known.
Dolphin PAD constants use uppercase SDK-style names such as PAD_CHAN0, PAD_CHANMAX, PAD_CHAN0_BIT, PAD_ERR_NO_CONTROLLER, and PAD_ERR_NONE.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Matched HSD_PadRenewStatus as a direct call-chain wrapper corresponding to the assembly calls to HSD_PadRenewRawStatus, HSD_PadRenewMasterStatus, HSD_PadRenewCopyStatus, and HSD_PadZeroQueue.

Matched HSD_PadReset by reproducing the loop over four controller channels and calls to HSD_PadRumbleRemoveAll, HSD_PadRumbleOffN, HSD_PadFlushQueue with HSD_PAD_FLUSH_QUEUE_THROWAWAY, PADRecalibrate with 0xF0000000, and reset_switch clearing.
Used named constants/enums where available, such as HSD_PAD_FLUSH_QUEUE_THROWAWAY, while preserving required literal values like the PADRecalibrate mask.
For functions not yet converted to C, updated asm labels and .endfn names so the known symbol identity could still propagate through the codebase.
Added static helpers for raw queue shifting, raw status button merge, and cross-direction filtering to support gradual controller.c reconstruction.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that fully implement HSD_PadFlushQueue, HSD_PadZeroQueue, HSD_PadRenewMasterStatus, or HSD_PadRenewCopyStatus.
Search for remaining HSD_Controller_* placeholders in sysdolphin/baselib/controller.s after PR 1191.
Compare PAD constant definitions against Dolphin SDK headers to confirm names and values.
Look for follow-up cleanup moving PAD_ERR_NO_CONTROLLER out of controller.h if duplicated with dolphin/pad/pad.h.
Search for later controller.c matches involving HSD_PadClampCheck3, HSD_PadADConvertCheck1, and HSD_PadRenewRawStatus.
